name: Tianhe (Core Module)
description: Launched April 2021 as the spine of the station—propulsion, power, life support, and the docking hub where Wentian and Mengtian were swung into the perpendicular T over the next eighteen months.
function_detail: Crew habitat, command and data handling, station-keeping thrusters, and the central dock for arriving Shenzhou crew and Tianzhou cargo.
